name: Slice 1 column-embedding probe (2026-05-30)
description: 6-case stress test for the Slice 1 ColumnSemanticRetriever. Mix of (a) real previous failures from session 186 [WIN-005, WIN-003] and (b) synonym/phrasing variations not present in the existing cue lists ('income', 'aged', 'charged', 'outage length'). Each question targets the column-pick step: without column embeddings the LLM may hallucinate or guess; with Slice 1, the cosine match against the column description should anchor the LLM on the right column.

Scenarios.Question: what was the highest income last month
Scenarios.Notes: 'income' is NOT in the existing derivedMetric cue list. Without column embeddings the LLM may pick PaidAmount or guess. With Slice 1, the cosine match against Bills.TotalAmount description should surface it.

Scenarios.Question: split customers into 4 buckets by total spend
Scenarios.Notes: From smoke 186 B-WIN-005 — failed with 'Invalid column name TotalSpend'. Column embeddings should anchor the LLM on Bills.TotalAmount (joined via CustomerId).

Scenarios.Question: what is the average aged ticket
Scenarios.Notes: 'aged' is NOT a derivedMetric cue. Without column embeddings the LLM has to guess. With Slice 1, cosine should match Tickets.CreatedAt and the DerivedMetricRule downstream produces DATEDIFF.

Scenarios.Question: how much was charged on electricity bills this year
Scenarios.Notes: 'charged' is not in the revenue cue list. Tests whether column embedding surfaces TotalAmount as the right column.

Scenarios.Question: show me outage length by region for the last quarter
Scenarios.Notes: 'outage length' is a derivedMetric cue (Batch 1). Tests cue + column embedding combination.

Scenarios.Question: running total of payments by month
Scenarios.Notes: From smoke 186 B-WIN-003 — failed with 'validation failed'. Column embeddings cannot fix the window shape but can anchor the LLM on Bills.PaidAmount as the payments column.
